content:
Hello Community!

We are now accepting proposals to host the 2027 Dataverse Community Meeting!

Please complete the following document and submit it
Proposal to Host a Dataverse Community Meeting.docx
before April 27th, 2026.

Please submit to the address in the document.

If your submission is accepted, we will need an announcement slide for the last day of the 2026 DCM in Barcelona! May 15-16, 2026!

Cheers -
Sonia
